title: CVE-2026-30839 - Wallos: SSRF via webhook test endpoint

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-30839 - Wallos: SSRF via webhook test endpoint
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/07
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*testwebhooknotifications.php*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
